tagline: The Outlook connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Outlook connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest email data from Microsoft Outlook into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Outlook connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest email data from Microsoft Outlook into Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Outlook connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
